name: Cunning Gooey Grapple
statusOutcome: [AttackerName] languidly surges forward to try and embrace [TargetName], and [TargetHeOrShe] starts to move to dodge, only to bump into a wall of bubbles that leave [TargetHimOrHer] staggering and easily wrapped up in the slime's arms as she starts to pull [TargetHimOrHer] into the pool with her! [TargetName] can't help but be a little baffled about when she put the bubbles there!
statusMiss: [AttackerName] languidly surges forward to try and embrace [TargetName], but [TargetHeOrShe] dodges her entirely!
